  <entry>

    <title>Elevated errors for multiple models</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>16</var>, <var data-var='time'>22:53</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This issue has been resolved. From 11:30am PT / 18:30 UTC through to 3:15pm PT / 22:15 UTC some users experienced elevated errors on requests to Claude Models. Most errors were experienced within the first hour of the impact window. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>16</var>, <var data-var='time'>22:01</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - We have seen success rates recover and are continuing to monitor closely to ensure no further issues.
